scripts.install: concurrently -n root,header,footer,home,auth,nav,user,products -c auto "npm --prefix apps/root-config install" "npm --prefix apps/header install" "npm --prefix apps/footer install" "npm --prefix apps/home install" "npm --prefix apps/auth install" "npm --prefix apps/nav install" "npm --prefix apps/user install" "npm --prefix apps/products install"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n root,header,footer,home,auth,nav,user,products -c auto "npm --prefix apps/root-config run dev" "npm --prefix apps/header run dev" "npm --prefix apps/footer run dev" "npm --prefix apps/home run dev" "npm --prefix apps/auth run dev" "npm --prefix apps/nav run dev" "npm --prefix apps/user run dev" "npm --prefix apps/products run dev"
